name: Peanutty Butternut Squash
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Lightly oil a 4 x 8 baking pan with sunflower oil.
3. Cut the squash in half, removing and discarding the seeds.
4. Place squash halves cut-side down in the baking pan with about 1/3-inch of water.
5. Bake for 40 minutes.
6. Remove squash from oven when cool enough to handle; peel and cut into 1-inch cubes.
7. Combine shallots with the squash in the baking pan.
8. In a blender, puree peanuts, oil, dill, thyme, basil, and salt until smooth.
9. Pour the puree over the squash and shallots.
10. Bake for an additional 20 minutes.
11. Top with sliced avocado.
